title: BSD-Hodge Transfer — Gross-Zagier Analog for Hodge Classes

analysis.object: T744: BSD-Hodge Transfer — Gross-Zagier Analog for Hodge Classes depth analysis

gross_zagier_bsd.description: Gross-Zagier: L'(E,1) != 0 -> Heegner point of infinite order -> rank 1
gross_zagier_bsd.reason: Explicit construction of rational point from L-function data

heegner_construction.description: Heegner point: CM points on modular curve lifted to elliptic curve
heegner_construction.reason: CM = EML-2 structure; modular curve = EML-3

bsd_hodge_analogy.description: BSD analog: L-function zero (EML-3) -> rational point (EML-0)
bsd_hodge_analogy.reason: Bridge via Heegner = EML-2 explicit construction

hodge_analog.description: Hodge analog: Hodge class (EML-3) -> algebraic cycle (EML-0)
hodge_analog.reason: Bridge would need explicit construction analogous to Heegner

heegner_for_hodge.description: Can we build a 'Hodge Heegner' construction for higher codimension?
heegner_for_hodge.reason: The question -- requires special geometry like CM type for abelian vars

deligne_connection.description: Deligne's proof for abelian varieties uses CM structure = Hodge Heegner
deligne_connection.reason: Deligne's method IS the Hodge Heegner for abelian varieties

t744_result.description: Hodge Heegner exists for abelian varieties (Deligne). Blocked for general X by absence of CM structure -- T744
t744_result.reason: Transfer succeeds in the Deligne case; general case needs new 'CM analog'

analysis.theorem: T744: BSD-Hodge Transfer — Gross-Zagier Analog for Hodge Classes (S1023).

key_theorem: T744: BSD-Hodge Transfer — Gross-Zagier Analog for Hodge Classes (S1023).
